zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Spring於1456年出生在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆時，他的父親Thomas Spring Jr.26歲，母親Margaret Appleton23歲。他於1493年與Anne King在英國素福爾可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1523年6月15日在他的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可拉文哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Spring于1456年出生在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆时，他的父亲Thomas Spring Jr.26岁，母亲Margaret Appleton23岁。他于1493年与Anne King在英国素福爾可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1523年6月15日在他的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可拉文哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Spring
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a young man, from Middle English, Old English spring ‘young growth’. The word is first recorded in the 16th century, but is quite likely much older. Compare Springett .
English: topographic name from Middle English, Old English spring, used for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees or (less often) a spring of water.

German and Danish: from Middle High German sprinc, Middle Low German sprink ‘spring, well’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or well, or a habitational name from Springe near Hanover.

variants.name: Sprung
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Achim, Gerhard.
German: from Middle High German sprunc ‘spring’, a topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or well (see also Spring 3, Sprang ).

variants.name: Springett
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a plantation of young trees, a copse, from an unrecorded Middle English, Old English springet. Compare Spring .
perhaps a nickname from an unrecorded Middle English diminutive of   Spring  , ‘young man’.

variants.name: Springs
meanings: English (Norfolk): variant of Spring with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Spring was born in 1456, in Lavenham, Suffolk, England, his father, Thomas Spring Jr., was 26 and his mother, Margaret Appleton, was 23. He married Anne King in 1493, in Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 15 June 1523, in his hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Spring est né en 1456, à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Spring Jr., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Appleton, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Anne King en 1493, à Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1523, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Lavenham, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Spring 1456 in Lavenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Spring Jr. 26 und seine Mutter Margaret Appleton 23. Er hat 1493 in Suffolk, England Anne King geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1523 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Lavenham, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Spring è nato il nel 1456 nel Lavenham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Thomas Spring Jr., aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Appleton, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Anne King nel 1493, nel Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 giugno 1523, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Lavenham, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Springが1456年にイギリススフォルクラベンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Spring Jr.は26歳，母Margaret Appletonは23歳であった。1493年にイギリススフォルクでAnne Kingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1523年6月15日に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクラベンハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Spring(이)가 1456년 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Spring Jr.(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Appleton(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1493년 영국 수폴크에서 Anne King(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1523년 6월 15일 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 레이븐함에 묻혔다.

mn.Hawstead Manor, Suffolk, England: Hawstead, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Spring nasceu em 1456, em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Spring Jr., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Appleton, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne King em 1493, em Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1523, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Spring родился в 1456 г. в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Spring Jr. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Appleton, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne King в 1493 г. в местности суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 15 июня 1523 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности лавенам, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Spring nació en 1456, en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Spring Jr., tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Appleton, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Anne King en 1493, en Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de junio de 1523, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Lavenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
